prompt: A high-impact anime magazine cover in a futuristic cyberpunk editorial style, vertical full-page composition with dense Japanese typography and neon graphic design. The main focus is a close-up duo portrait in the foreground: on the left, a handsome anime boy with messy black hair streaked with bright cyan and a bold white front bang, sharp golden eyes, pale skin, a subtle confident smile, silver hoop earrings, and a black streetwear outfit with a hooded jacket, zipper details, layered shirt, and a black choker. On the right, slightly lower and partially overlapping him, a stylish anime girl with long wavy light-blonde hair, a black cap, oversized dark sunglasses, a glossy purple-and-white futuristic jacket, and one gloved finger raised near her lips in a cool pose. Surrounding them are 4 inset character portraits arranged diagonally along the upper-right side: 1 silver-haired anime boy in dark clothing, 1 purple-haired anime girl with violet eyes, 1 small silver-haired anime character with blue and pink highlights in the eyes, and 1 smaller brown-haired character near the lower-right edge. Use a dark black and deep navy background with electric magenta, hot pink, and cyan light streaks, glowing shards, splatter textures, halftone patterns, angular frames, and diagonal UI-like accents. The layout should look like a premium Japanese feature magazine cover, with large distressed metallic-white kanji headline across the top reading 共鳴する絆, smaller Japanese subheads and editorial callouts around the page, a top-right feature block reading “FEATURE VOL. 04 2024 SPRING 創刊号,” a left-side focus block, a bottom-left page marker reading “4/5 PAGE,” and small branding marks and decorative symbols throughout. Strong contrast, glossy print finish, layered depth, dramatic rim lighting, vivid neon reflections, stylish urban sci-fi atmosphere, polished gacha-game or light-novel promotional art quality.
